acceptance_targets: [CH16_CRAFT_001] PASS if the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:183 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:292 lets a reader state, from on-page evidence, whether Deshawn received inhaler access that night and includes at least one specific physical marker of his condition; FAIL if the chapter still leaves medical status as speculation only.

[CH16_BOOKER_001] PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:236 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306, at least one newly occurring event on-page creates irreversible leverage (legal, evidentiary, or custody) beyond waiting and recaps; FAIL if the section remains primarily status checks plus summary updates.

[CH16_DIALOGUE_001] PASS if the revised dialogue around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:209 contains no more than one consecutive pure Q/A pair and includes at least one Mara reframe line plus one Lena pressure-burst line that is not a direct answer form; FAIL if the sequence still reads as interview transcript rhythm.

[CH16_PROSE_001] PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:224, the exact "thought of" construction appears no more than once and equivalent emotional information is delivered through at least two concrete sensory/action details; FAIL if the triadic cognition listing pattern remains.

[CH16_PROSE_002] PASS if the revised openings around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:302 do not reuse the same token cluster in all three and each opening contains at least one location-specific sensory detail not shared by the others; FAIL if repeated motif language remains dominant across all entries.

[F009] Pass if the revised podium/corridor exchange distinguishes Clay's polished performance voice from Lena's stressed refusal voice without both sounding equally formal; fail if revised speech remains mostly uncontracted and similarly clause-heavy across speakers.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:183 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:292 lets a reader state, from on-page evidence, whether Deshawn received inhaler access that night and includes at least one specific physical marker of his condition; FAIL if the chapter still leaves medical status as speculation only.
findings.problem: Sanitization/timidity drift at the peak custody-risk beat: the chapter raises potentially life-threatening inhaler deprivation, but the prose retreats into administrative opacity and speculative imagining instead of rendering a concrete bodily/institutional consequence on-page.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the jail sequence at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:292, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:316 to deliver one verifiable custody-medical outcome before chapter close (for example: confirmed administration, documented refusal with staff name/time, or observed respiratory decline through a permitted contact point). Keep Lena in-POV, but replace inference-only narration with concrete consequence.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:236 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306, at least one newly occurring event on-page creates irreversible leverage (legal, evidentiary, or custody) beyond waiting and recaps; FAIL if the section remains primarily status checks plus summary updates.
findings.problem: Scene-two momentum plateaus in a waiting-loop: after a strong public-refusal beat, the chapter spends a long stretch in procedural holding without a fresh on-page leverage shift until the off-page publication update, weakening causal propulsion toward the close.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the middle-late jail stretch at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:236 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:288 so at least one live event changes tactical position before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:306 (for example: documented intake breach, defense escalation triggered by new evidence, or a forced choice that materially alters the overnight strategy).

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised dialogue around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:209 contains no more than one consecutive pure Q/A pair and includes at least one Mara reframe line plus one Lena pressure-burst line that is not a direct answer form; FAIL if the sequence still reads as interview transcript rhythm.
findings.problem: Mara-Lena exchange slips into deposition cadence (stacked question/answer units), compressing distinct idiolects at a moment that should show sharper register contrast under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the exchange centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:209 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:228 so Mara's voice carries her evidence-reframing signature and Lena's stressed register breaks out of clean Q/A rhythm (interruptions, compressed colloquial bursts, or aborted starts) while preserving factual clarity.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:224, the exact "thought of" construction appears no more than once and equivalent emotional information is delivered through at least two concrete sensory/action details; FAIL if the triadic cognition listing pattern remains.
findings.problem: Recurring cognition template ("thought of" list construction) appears more than twice and flattens interior rhythm into enumerated summary rather than scene-active interiority.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:43 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:224, replace at least two "thought of" clauses with embodied triggers tied to immediate environment or action (object contact, sound, physical reflex) so interiority emerges through scene texture instead of stacked cognition statements.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised openings around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:302 do not reuse the same token cluster in all three and each opening contains at least one location-specific sensory detail not shared by the others; FAIL if repeated motif language remains dominant across all entries.
findings.problem: Environmental texture leans on repeated canonical token clusters (cicadas, bleach-old paper, fluorescent buzz, levee wind) in multiple scene entries, creating checklist feel and reducing sentence-level surprise.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework scene-entry texture at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:302 by retaining one anchor motif but varying at least two sensory vectors per entry (for example: tactile pressure, sound profile, or material detail unique to that location and beat) instead of repeating the same environmental signature set.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised podium/corridor exchange distinguishes Clay's polished performance voice from Lena's stressed refusal voice without both sounding equally formal; fail if revised speech remains mostly uncontracted and similarly clause-heavy across speakers.
findings.problem: The same register issue recurs in a peak-stakes press scene: dialogue repeatedly defaults to formal legal exposition and shared rhetorical shape, reducing character distinctness and scene volatility.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten and de-formalize key turns at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5250, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5264, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5288, snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5308, and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5312. Keep legal precision, but move spoken texture toward contractions, asymmetry, and pressure-specific idiolect contrast.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
